events.headline: TRUMP SAYS ‘MANY COUNTRIES’ WILL SEND WARSHIPS TO HORMUZ AMID IRAN BLOCKADE
events.detail: US president urges naval coalition as Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed to 'tankers and ships of enemies' during war.

events.headline: IRAN ALLOWS LIMITED INDIAN SHIPPING THROUGH STRAIT OF HORMUZ
events.detail: Iran has allowed some Indian vessels through the Strait of Hormuz.

events.headline: IRAN SAYS STRAIT OF HORMUZ WILL NOT BE REOPENED TO US SHIPS
events.detail: A member of Iran’s Expediency Council says the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed to US ships.

events.headline: OIL TANKER ATTACKED OFF RUSSIAN COAST
events.detail: A Greek-flagged oil tanker was attacked by a “missile or a drone” off the Russian Black Sea coast, the shipping ministry in Athens has said Read Full Article at RT.com

events.headline: HAMAS URGES KEY ALLY IRAN TO HALT ATTACKS ON GULF STATES
events.detail: The Palestinian group also affirms Tehran's right to defend itself from "aggression" by the US and Israel.

events.headline: TWO INDIAN SHIPS CROSS STRAIT OF HORMUZ AS IRAN SAYS IT ALLOWED PASSAGE
events.detail: Iran's envoy to New Delhi says Tehran allowed some Indian vessels to pass the Strait in rare exception to the blockade.
